svg.text: Sensor Telemetry → Integrity Verification → Detection Layers → Agentic LLM Swarm → MLOps Feedback
all sensors stamp at point of origin
① HMAC ② Temporal/Seq ③ Cross-OS
Tensor parallelism · Flash Attention 2 · PagedAttention KV cache
Podman Quadlets · deepnet overlay network (zero external routing)
Models B + C + D served via vLLM · Model A on dedicated GPU node
Model D: SOAR Critic (Blast Radius Engine)
MDP: FP penalty ≫ TP reward on critical assets
PHASE 6 -- SOVEREIGN MLOPS PIPELINE & RLHF FEEDBACK
All pass → merge · any fail → halt + retrain
LoRA merge + SHA-384 sign → atomic symlink deploy → vLLM
ZERO STATE -- ATTACK SURFACE RETURNED TO ZERO
Only forensic artifacts persist. All containers, databases, contexts, and secrets destroyed.
PHASE 1 (Sensor) → PHASE 2 (Ingress/Fan-Out) → PHASE 3 (Detection) → PHASE 4 (LLM Swarm) → PHASE 5 (Operator/Containment) → PHASE 6 (MLOps/RLHF) → ZERO STATE
